heading: Election of annuity: former members of armed forces
label: 1432 Election of annuity: former members of armed forces
text: A person who was a former member of an armed force on , and who is granted retired or retainer pay after that date, may, at the time he is granted that pay, make an election as provided in .November 1, 1953section 1431 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)143237:372(a) (5th sentence).(5th sentence), .Aug. 8, 1953, ch. 393, § 3(a)67 Stat. 502
